message.content:
@startuml
title Ski Championships\nManagement
caption Ski Championships Management\nClass Diagram\nBertrand C
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

package "Scm" {

class Event << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> id: int
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> location: string
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> startDate: Date
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> endDate: Date
  --
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> create(): Event
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> update()
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> delete(): bool
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> list(): <u>Event</u>[]
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> export(): bool
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> import(): bool
}

class Result << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> time: Time
  --
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> create(): Result
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> delete(): bool
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> list(): Result[]
}

class Run << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> number: int
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> time: Time
  --
  Getters and setters:
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> getId()
  ..Other methods......
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> create(): Run
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> delete(): bool
}

class Competitor << (C,#b7d7b7) >> {
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> id: int
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> lastName: string
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> firstName: string
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> birthDate: Date
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> bibNumber: int
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> email: string
  <color:#cc0000>□</color> photo: resource
  --
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> create(): Competitor
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> update()
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> delete(): bool
  <color:#2e8b57>●</color> list(): <u>Competitor</u>[]
}

abstract class Metadata << (A,#b7d7b7) >> {
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> id: int
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> name: string
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> description: string
  --
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> create()
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> update()
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> delete(): bool
  <color:#caa400>◇</color> list(): Metadata
}

class Category << (C,#b7d7b7) >>
class Profile  << (C,#b7d7b7) >>

' Central associations
Event "1" *-- "0..n" Competitor : takes part

Competitor *.. Result : obtains
Competitor *.. Run : runs

' Bottom associations
Competitor "0..n" o-- "1" Category : belongs to
Competitor "0..n" o-- "1" Profile : has

Category -|> Metadata
Profile  -|> Metadata

}

@enduml
